server/tests/test_export.py :: test_build_analyze_export_structure
def test_build_analyze_export_structure():
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(10, 8, 40, 80, 120))
    document = build_analyze_export(payload, "icon.png")
    assert document["type"] == "analyze"
    assert document["source"]["filename"] == "icon.png"
    assert document["report"]["width"] == 10
    assert document["report"]["stats"]["dimensions"]["height"] == 8
    assert document["generated_at"].endswith("+00:00")

server/tests/test_export.py :: test_build_validate_export_marks_valid_png
def test_build_validate_export_marks_valid_png():
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(6, 6, 200, 200, 200))
    document = build_validate_export(payload, "gray.png")
    assert document["type"] == "validate"
    assert document["report"]["valid"] is True
    assert document["report"]["stats"]["exposure"]

server/tests/test_export.py :: test_build_compare_export_includes_metrics
def test_build_compare_export_includes_metrics():
    raster = solid_raster(8, 8, 100, 50, 25)
    left = png_bytes(raster)
    right = jpeg_bytes(raster, quality=90)
    document = build_compare_export(left, "a.png", right, "b.jpg")
    assert document["type"] == "compare"
    assert "ssim" in document["report"]
    assert document["sources"]["left"]["byte_size"] == len(left)
